pattern.note: Captured with setFillsAsync; the frame includes a visible source node so clipboard import has the referenced pattern source. Direct node.fills assignment rejects PATTERN.

PATTERN_DIRECT_FILLS_ASSIGNMENT.message: Directly assigning PATTERN to node.fills fails validation; Figma requires setFillsAsync after loading/referencing the pattern source node.

NOISE_ASYNC_FILLS.message: setFillsAsync rejects NOISE; supported async non-standard paint discriminator is PATTERN with required tileType and sourceNodeId.

CUSTOM_ASYNC_FILLS.message: setFillsAsync rejects CUSTOM; supported async non-standard paint discriminator is PATTERN with required tileType and sourceNodeId.

status: A real PATTERN payload is captured through Figma's async paint API with source and target in the same copied subtree. Real NOISE and CUSTOM paint payloads are still unavailable in the connected Figma file and committed .fig fixtures, so first-class rendering for those remains blocked on Figma-authored samples.
